positive: A highly stylized, central composition featuring a majestic constellation map design. The main subject is a mythical phoenix rising from stylized geometric smoke clouds, rendered in vibrant, glowing blues, golds, and deep magentas. The overall style is neo-Art Deco celestial mixed with modern minimalist etching, providing clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast. Use radiating celestial lines and celestial bodies like stylized moons and planets that form a visually balanced crest. The background should be solid midnight blue/black to maximize print clarity and contrast for apparel transfer. Intricate yet legible lines, graphic vector aesthetic, high detail.
negative: blurry, realistic, photo, grainy, lowres, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutation, ugly, noise
